## Local AI certificate

Unchecked certificate items block merge readiness for epic PRs.

- [ ] Local Codex phase certificate exists
- [ ] Certificate verdict is PASS
- [ ] Certificate head_sha matches the certified phase-work commit
- [ ] If committed, the certificate is in a certificate-only commit
- [ ] No blocking findings remain

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Lint passes locally
- [ ] Build passes locally
- [ ] Typecheck passes locally, if applicable
- [ ] `bash scripts/verify-local.sh`

## Risk

- [ ] Security risk reviewed
- [ ] Migration risk reviewed
- [ ] Deployment risk reviewed
- [ ] Rollback notes updated

## Release readiness

- [ ] RELEASE_NOTES.md updated
- [ ] ROLLBACK.md updated
- [ ] RISK_REGISTER.md updated
